requirements.jd_requirement: Help innovate and build security solutions that monitor and protect our multi-cloud environment
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management, Containerized security services
requirements.evidence: Built secure cloud operations for AWS ECS deployments with IAM and secrets management; implemented containerized security services in production environments

requirements.jd_requirement: Build deployable security controls and remediation workflows
requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability remediation automation, Endpoint hardening workflows, Patch orchestration, Secure implementation practices
requirements.evidence: Developed and operated deployable security controls for endpoint hardening and patch orchestration, with measurable risk reduction

requirements.jd_requirement: Create automation to reduce manual effort in security operations
requirements.matched_skills: Python automation, Remediation scripting, Runbook-driven automation, Administrative tooling
requirements.evidence: Built Python-based remediation scripts and runbook-driven automation for endpoint and cloud security workflows

requirements.jd_requirement: Integrate with multiple platforms and APIs for end-to-end security workflows
requirements.matched_skills: API-driven workflows, System-to-system workflow automation, Microsoft Graph API automation
requirements.evidence: Designed and deployed cross-platform integrations using APIs to unify security workflows across endpoints, cloud, and identity systems

requirements.jd_requirement: Operate reliably in CI/CD and infrastructure-as-code environments
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, Automated build and deploy workflows
requirements.evidence: Embedded security into CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Terraform; delivered secure, repeatable deployments

requirements.jd_requirement: Use data to drive security analytics and correlation
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Correlation logic, Asset reconciliation, Inventory drift resolution
requirements.evidence: Built data pipelines for asset reconciliation and inventory drift resolution across heterogeneous security telemetry sources

requirements.jd_requirement: Leverage AI for SecOps where appropriate and auditable
requirements.matched_skills: RAG pipelines, LangChain, Embeddings-based retrieval, AI governance and auditability
requirements.evidence: Developed auditable RAG pipelines using LangChain for security context retrieval and incident triage

tone_notes: Match Astronomer’s pragmatic, builder-oriented tone—emphasize operational reliability, shipping production-grade tooling, and cross-functional execution over theoretical security concepts. Avoid jargon-heavy or marketing language; favor clarity, ownership, and measurable impact.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds and operates production-grade automation for multi-cloud environments, with a focus on deployable controls, data-driven correlation, and AI-augmented workflows that reduce manual effort while maintaining operational reliability.
